feed.title: Ruby development
feed.subtitle: A minimal, responsive and feature-rich Jekyll theme for technical writing.

entry.title: How to fix incorrect locale
entry.summary:
Can’t set locale; make sure $LC_* and $LANG are correct!
perl: warning: Setting locale failed. perl: warning: Please check that your locale settings: LANGUAGE = "en_US:en", LC_ALL = (unset), LC_TIME = "uk_UA.UTF-8", LC_MONETARY = "uk_UA.UTF-8", LC_ADDRESS = "uk_UA.UTF-8", LC_TELEPHONE = "uk_UA.UTF-8", LC_NAME = "uk_UA.UTF-8", LC_MEASUREMENT = "uk_UA.UTF-8", LC_IDENTIFICATION = "uk_UA....

entry.title: How to start up docker compose on boot

link.title: How to start up docker compose on boot

entry.summary:
For example, we have /opt/myapp/docker-compose.yml
1) Create /etc/systemd/system/docker-compose-myapp.service [Unit] Description=Docker Compose Application Service Requires=docker.service After=docker.service [Service] WorkingDirectory=/opt/myapp ExecStart=/usr/bin/docker compose up ExecStop=/usr/bin/docker compose down TimeoutStartSec=0 Restart=on-failure StartLimitIntervalSec=60 StartLimitBu...

entry.title: How to configure NFS server/client
entry.summary:
Server
sudo apt-get update sudo apt-get install nfs-kernel-server
sudo mkdir /nfs_share sudo chown nobody:nogroup /nfs_share sudo chmod 777 /nfs_share
Configure NFS share folder(/etc/exports) /nfs_share 192.168.1.10(rw,sync,no_subtree_check)
192.168.1.10 - ip of NFS client
####export, enable and start NFS share sudo exportfs -a sudo systemctl enable nfs-kernel-server sudo systemctl ...

entry.title: How to install and configure MySql Server

link.title: How to install and configure MySql Server

entry.summary:
Install MySql Server sudo apt install mysql-server
Configure MySql Server
Open Mysql console sudo mysql
Set root password ALTER USER 'root'@'localhost' IDENTIFIED WITH mysql_native_password BY 'password';
Allow use default authentication method ALTER USER 'root'@'localhost' IDENTIFIED WITH auth_socket;
Run the security script sudo mysql_secure_installation
Creating a MySql User CREATE U...

entry.title: How to install specific Mysql version

link.title: How to install specific Mysql version

entry.summary:
For example, we should install Mysql version 8.0.34
1) Check version apt-cache policy mysql-server
mysql-server: Installed: 8.0.34-0ubuntu0.20.04.1 Candidate: 8.0.34-0ubuntu0.20.04.1 Version table: *** 8.0.34-0ubuntu0.20.04.1 500 500 http://ua.archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu focal-updates/main amd64 Packages 500 http://ua.archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu focal-security/main amd64 Pa...
